items.title: Best gacha game I’ve played in a while
items.summary:
-Theirs always a way to make you’re favorite characters meta
-You never run out of things to do
-You can almost always get the characters you want, limited and standard
-Other than shared pity on the standard and limited banner, have recommended to all my friends
items.author: Arxtxc

items.title: Best deck building type game you’ll ever play
items.summary: Love it so much. It’s that kind of gaming experience that even if the game is so F2P, you still want to spend just to support the devs. And even without spending, you will have the best time
items.author: SeñorTamago

items.title: Amazing!
items.summary: Fun gameplay, great art and graphics, and very generous.
items.author: NicknameIsAlreadyTaken :/
